title: Luffy’s Grief and the ASL Past: Key Exchange
description: In the Post-War / ASL Flashback storyline, this section centers on Sabo, Dadan, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #16, Unknown person #17, Unknown person #18 as the scene develops across pages 9–12.
scene: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Sabo, Dadan, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #16, Unknown person #17, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy’s grief and the asl past: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: We'll borrow your bath occasion- nally.

dialogue.speaker: Dadan
dialogue.text: Hey!! Dadan's country!! Is anyone home?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: How to make a proper greeting?

dialogue.speaker: Dadan
dialogue.text: Well, I'm Luffy's big brother, you see...

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Don't give me that, you brats!!!

dialogue.speaker: Dadan
dialogue.text: Dear Me... What will old GARP say...?

summary: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Sabo, Dadan, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #16, Unknown person #17, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy’s grief and the asl past: key exchange.
